SEARCH
Package com.nib.supernaut

Class SupernautRegion

java.lang.Object
com.nib.supernaut.SupernautRegion
@Service @EnableScheduling public class SupernautRegion extends Object

    • getStatus

      public RegionStatus getStatus()
      Retrieves the current status of the region as a RegionStatus enumeration.
      Returns:
      the current RegionStatus based on the internal status value.

    • isAvailable

      public boolean isAvailable()
      Checks if the region is currently available by verifying if its status is set to Running.
      Returns:
      true if the region status is Running; false otherwise.

    • getId

      public String getId()

      Returns the default JDBC datasource for ESQL commands
      Returns:
      the default JDBC datasource for ESQL commands

    • getVsamDataSource

      public DataSource getVsamDataSource()
      Returns the default JDBC datasource for VSAM files
      Returns:
      the default JDBC datasource for VSAM files

    • retrieveCwa

      public Memory retrieveCwa()
      Retrieves the region's Common Work Area (CWA)
      Returns:
      the memory object of the CWA

    • storeCwa

      public void storeCwa()
      Stores the region's Common Work Area (CWA)

    • getMain

      public GetMainStorage getMain(int length, byte initimg, boolean shared)
      Retrieves and initializes a main storage object with the specified configuration.
      Parameters:
      length - the desired length of the storage object
      initimg - the initial byte value to fill the storage object with
      shared - a flag indicating whether the storage object should be shared across tasks and cluster
      Returns:
      a configured instance of GetMainStorage

    • attachGetmainStorage

      public GetMainStorage attachGetmainStorage(int id)
      Attaches to the shared memory resource specified by the given ID and initializes a GetMainStorage instance if the resource exists.
      Parameters:
      id - the unique identifier for the shared memory resource
      Returns:
      a new instance of GetMainStorage if the resource exists, or null if the resource does not exist

    • freeMain

      public boolean freeMain(GetMainStorage storage)
      Frees the main storage if it is shared by performing a delete operation.
      Parameters:
      storage - the main storage object to be checked and potentially deleted
      Returns:
      true after the operation is complete

    • newTask

      public Task newTask(StartCode startCode, ITerminalHandler terminal, PctEntry pct)
      Creates and registers a new task in the system if the region is available.
      Parameters:
      startCode - the start code representing the task's initiation details.
      terminal - the terminal handler associated with the task.
      pct - the process control table entry associated with the task.
      Returns:
      the newly created task.
      Throws:
      RegionUnavailableException - if the region is not available for creating a new task.

    • contextBuilder

      public SupernautContextBuilder contextBuilder(PctEntry pct)
      Constructs a SupernautContextBuilder using the specified PctEntry.
      Parameters:
      pct - the PctEntry used to build the SupernautContextBuilder
      Returns:
      a SupernautContextBuilder instance built with the given PctEntry

    • connect

      public TerminalSession connect(IConnectionRequest connectionRequest, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication authentication) throws TerminalException
      Connects to a terminal session using the given connection request and authentication details. This method acquires a terminal, authenticates the user (if authentication information is provided), and creates a terminal session.
      Parameters:
      connectionRequest - the connection request containing terminal and session-specific details
      authentication - optional authentication details to validate the user
      Returns:
      a TerminalSession object representing the active session, or null if the session could not be established
      Throws:
      TerminalException - if the terminal is not available or if authentication fails

    • disconnect

      public void disconnect(SessionToken token) throws TerminalException
      Disconnects a session using the provided session token. This method ensures that the session is removed from the active sessions list and releases the associated terminal if applicable.
      Parameters:
      token - the session token used to identify the session to be disconnected
      Throws:
      TerminalException - if the session cannot be found or there is a mismatch

    • updateSession

      public void updateSession(TerminalSession s) throws TerminalException
      Updates the given terminal session. Ensures the session is updated in the active sessions map if it exists. Throws an exception if the session is not found in the active sessions map.
      Parameters:
      s - the terminal session to be updated
      Throws:
      TerminalException - if the session is not found in the active sessions map

    • attach

      public TerminalSession attach(SessionToken token) throws TerminalException
      Attaches to an existing terminal session using the provided session token.
      Parameters:
      token - the session token used to identify and attach to an existing terminal session
      Returns:
      the terminal session associated with the provided token
      Throws:
      TerminalException - if the session cannot be found or if an error occurs during attachment

    • acquireTerminal

      public TctEntry acquireTerminal(String termid, IConnectionRequest req) throws TerminalException
      Acquires a terminal based on the provided terminal ID or connection request. The method checks if the terminal is defined, enabled, and not busy before assigning it. If a terminal ID is not provided, it attempts to find a terminal that matches the connection request criteria or performs an auto-install terminal search.
      Parameters:
      termid - The unique identifier for the terminal to be acquired. It can be null, in which case the method will attempt to assign a terminal based on the connection request.
      req - An IConnectionRequest object that contains details such as netname and terminal IP, which can be used to locate a suitable terminal when termid is null.
      Returns:
      A TctEntry representing the assigned terminal if an appropriate terminal is successfully found and acquired.
      Throws:
      TerminalException - If the terminal ID is not defined, disabled, busy, or there is an error updating the terminal entry. Other cases for exception include no suitable terminal type found or general errors during terminal acquisition.

    • releaseTerminal

      public void releaseTerminal(TctEntry tct)
      Releases a terminal by handling its resources and updating its state. If the terminal is auto-installed, its entry is removed. Otherwise, the terminal's release method is called and it is updated in the system.
      Parameters:
      tct - the terminal entry to be released

    • startTransid

      public CommandResponse startTransid(ExecutionContext context, String sysid, String transid, byte[] from, int fromOffset, int fromlen, String termid, Interval timeInterval, Channel channel, String user, String queue, boolean protect)
      Starts a transaction identified by the specified transaction ID (transid). It performs validation checks such as verifying authorization, terminal ID, and data configurations, and processes the request accordingly. The transaction can optionally be secured for protected processing purposes.
      Parameters:
      context - The execution context used to track the current processing environment.
      sysid - The system identifier where the transaction is to be initiated.
      transid - The transaction ID used to identify the process being started.
      from - An optional byte array containing data input for the transaction.
      fromOffset - The starting index in the byte array for transaction data.
      fromlen - The length of data to be utilized from the byte array.
      termid - The terminal ID associated with this transaction, if applicable.
      timeInterval - An interval object specifying the timing configuration for the transaction.
      channel - A channel object representing any additional data exchange mechanism for the transaction.
      user - The identifier for the user initiating the transaction.
      queue - An optional queue name associated with the transaction.
      protect - A boolean flag determining whether the transaction should be processed as a protected request.
      Returns:
      A CommandResponse indicating the outcome of the transaction start request. Possible responses include success, authorization failure, term ID error, length error, or other validation issues.

    • start

      public CommandResponse start(TaskInitRequest req)

    • enqResource

      public CommandResponse enqResource(String resource, boolean nosuspend)
      Attempts to acquire a lock on the specified resource. If the `nosuspend` flag is set to true, the method will try to acquire the lock without blocking and return an appropriate response. If the `nosuspend` flag is false, the method will block until the lock is acquired.
      Parameters:
      resource - the name of the resource for which the lock should be acquired
      nosuspend - a boolean flag indicating whether the method should acquire the lock without blocking (true) or block until the lock is acquired (false)
      Returns:
      a CommandResponse indicating the result of the lock acquisition. Dfhresp.Normal is returned if the lock is successfully acquired. Dfhresp.Enqbusy is returned if the lock could not be acquired without blocking when `nosuspend` is true.

    • deqResource

      public CommandResponse deqResource(String resource)
      Dequeues a resource by unlocking the associated semaphore if it is held by the current thread.
      Parameters:
      resource - the name of the resource to be dequeued
      Returns:
      a CommandResponse object containing the result of the dequeue operation, with a status of either Normal if the resource was successfully unlocked, or Invreq if the current thread did not hold the lock

    • retrievePctEntry

      public PctEntry retrievePctEntry(String id)
      Retrieves a PctEntry object associated with the specified identifier.
      Parameters:
      id - the unique identifier associated with the desired PctEntry
      Returns:
      the PctEntry object corresponding to the provided id, or null if no entry is found

    • retrieveFctEntry

      public FctEntry retrieveFctEntry(String id)
      Retrieves a FctEntry object based on the provided identifier.
      Parameters:
      id - the identifier of the FctEntry to be retrieved
      Returns:
      the FctEntry object corresponding to the given identifier, or null if no match is found

    • retrieveDctEntry

      public DctEntry retrieveDctEntry(String id)
      Retrieves a DctEntry object based on the provided identifier.
      Parameters:
      id - the unique identifier of the DctEntry to be retrieved
      Returns:
      the DctEntry associated with the given identifier, or null if no entry exists

    • updateFctEntry

      public boolean updateFctEntry(FctEntry f)
      Updates an existing FctEntry if it exists. The method will attempt to find an existing entry with the same ID as the provided FctEntry, and if found, update it with the given data.
      Parameters:
      f - the FctEntry object containing the updated data to be stored
      Returns:
      true if the entry was successfully updated, false otherwise

    • updateDctEntry

      public boolean updateDctEntry(DctEntry f)
      Updates an existing entry in the DCT with the specified entry. If the entry with the given ID exists, it will be updated with the new entry.
      Parameters:
      f - the DctEntry object containing the updated data and the ID to locate the existing entry
      Returns:
      true if the entry was successfully updated, false if the entry does not exist

    • retrieveTctEntry

      public TctEntry retrieveTctEntry(String id)
      Retrieves a TctEntry object associated with the specified identifier.
      Parameters:
      id - the unique identifier of the TctEntry to be retrieved
      Returns:
      the TctEntry object corresponding to the provided identifier, or null if no entry exists for the given identifier

    • getPctEntries

      public Collection<PctEntry> getPctEntries()
      Retrieves a collection of PctEntry objects defined in the region.
      Returns:
      a collection of PctEntry objects obtained from the internal mapping.

    • getFctEntries

      public Collection<FctEntry> getFctEntries()
      Retrieves a collection of FctEntry objects defined in the region.
      Returns:
      a collection of FctEntry objects obtained from the internal mapping.

    • getDctEntries

      public Collection<DctEntry> getDctEntries()
      Retrieves a collection of DctEntry objects defined in the region.
      Returns:
      a collection of DctEntry objects obtained from the internal mapping.

    • getTctEntries

      public Collection<TctEntry> getTctEntries()
      Retrieves a collection of TctEntry objects defined in the region.
      Returns:
      a collection of TctEntry objects obtained from the internal mapping.

    • getDocTemplatesEntries

      public Collection<DocTemplateEntry> getDocTemplatesEntries()
      Retrieves a collection of DocTemplateEntry objects defined in the region.
      Returns:
      a collection of DocTemplateEntry objects obtained from the internal mapping.

    • retrieveDocTemplateEntry

      public DocTemplateEntry retrieveDocTemplateEntry(String id)
      Retrieves a document template entry by its identifier. If the template content is not loaded, it attempts to load the content from the configured path.
      Parameters:
      id - the identifier of the document template entry to retrieve
      Returns:
      the retrieved document template entry, or null if no template matches the given identifier

    • loadMapset

      public MapSet loadMapset(String mapset)
      Loads a mapset configuration based on the provided name. If the mapset is already cached, it retrieves it from the cache. Otherwise, it attempts to load the mapset from the configured resource paths.
      Parameters:
      mapset - The name of the mapset to be loaded. This refers to the identifier of the mapset configuration.
      Returns:
      A MapSet object containing the configuration for the specified mapset. Returns null if the mapset is not found or cannot be loaded.

    • loadMap

      public Map loadMap(String mapset, String map)
      Loads a specific map from a given mapset.
      Parameters:
      mapset - the name of the mapset from which the map will be loaded
      map - the name of the map to be loaded
      Returns:
      the map matching the provided name if found within the specified map set, otherwise returns null

    • authenticate

      public User authenticate(String userid, String password, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication authentication)
      Authenticates a user using the provided credentials and/or existing authentication.
      Parameters:
      userid - the unique identifier of the user attempting to authenticate
      password - the password associated with the user
      authentication - the authentication object to be used for validation
      Returns:
      the authenticated User object if authentication is successful

    • changePassword

      public User changePassword(String user, String password, String newPassword)
      Changes the password for the specified user. Verifies the current password before updating it to the new password.
      Parameters:
      user - the username of the account whose password is to be changed
      password - the current password of the user
      newPassword - the new password to set for the user
      Returns:
      the updated User object after the password change

    • assignUser

      public User assignUser(String userid)
      Assigns a user based on the provided user ID. If the user ID is null or empty, the default user will be returned. Otherwise, retrieves the user associated with the given user ID using the authentication provider.
      Parameters:
      userid - the unique identifier of the user to be assigned; must not be null or empty
      Returns:
      the assigned user corresponding to the provided user ID, or the default user if the user ID is null or empty

    • getDefaultUser

      public User getDefaultUser()

    • publishAdminMessage

      public void publishAdminMessage(AdminMessage msg)
      Publishes an admin message to the admin topic.
      Parameters:
      msg - the admin message to be published
